first_paragraph: ***Il vostro superagente Flit*** (lit. Your superagent Flint) is a 1966 Italian [spy](/wiki/Spy_film "Spy film") [comedy film](/wiki/Comedy_film "Comedy film") that is a parody of *[Our Man Flint](/wiki/Our_Man_Flint "Our Man Flint")* (*Il nostro agente Flint*). Starring [Raimondo Vianello](/wiki/Raimondo_Vianello "Raimondo Vianello") and [Raffaella Carra](/wiki/Raffaella_Carra "Raffaella Carra"), it was directed by [Mariano Laurenti](/wiki/Mariano_Laurenti "Mariano Laurenti") in his debut as a director and written by [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci"), who also wrote the [James Tont](/wiki/James_Tont_operazione_U.N.O. "James Tont operazione U.N.O.") films.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1966 Italian film

| Il vostro superagente Flit | |
| --- | --- |

| Written by | Franco Siniscalchi   [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci") |
| Starring | [Raimondo Vianello](/wiki/Raimondo_Vianello "Raimondo Vianello") [Raffaella Carrà](/wiki/Raffaella_Carr%C3%A0 "Raffaella Carrà") Pamela Tudor |
| Cinematography | [Tino Santoni](/wiki/Tino_Santoni "Tino Santoni") |
| Music by | [Bruno Canfora](/wiki/Bruno_Canfora "Bruno Canfora") |
| Distributed by | Ima Film |

| Country | Italy |
| Language | [Italian](/wiki/Italian_language "Italian language") |

***Il vostro superagente Flit*** (lit. Your superagent Flint) is a 1966 Italian [spy](/wiki/Spy_film "Spy film") [comedy film](/wiki/Comedy_film "Comedy film") that is a parody of *[Our Man Flint](/wiki/Our_Man_Flint "Our Man Flint")* (*Il nostro agente Flint*). Starring [Raimondo Vianello](/wiki/Raimondo_Vianello "Raimondo Vianello") and [Raffaella Carra](/wiki/Raffaella_Carra "Raffaella Carra"), it was directed by [Mariano Laurenti](/wiki/Mariano_Laurenti "Mariano Laurenti") in his debut as a director and written by [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci"), who also wrote the [James Tont](/wiki/James_Tont_operazione_U.N.O. "James Tont operazione U.N.O.") films.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Plot

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Il_vostro_super_agente_Flit&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Plot")]

When the world is threatened by a series of mysterious catastrophic events from an unknown power from alien planet called Bral, only one man can save the planet...Your Man Flit.

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Il_vostro_super_agente_Flit&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Raimondo Vianello](/wiki/Raimondo_Vianello "Raimondo Vianello") as Agent Flit
* [Raffaella Carrà](/wiki/Raffaella_Carr%C3%A0 "Raffaella Carrà") as Aura
* [Fernando Sancho](/wiki/Fernando_Sancho "Fernando Sancho") as Smirnoff
* [Pamela Tudor](/w/index.php?title=Pamela_Tudor&action=edit&redlink=1 "Pamela Tudor (page does not exist)") as Mrs. Smirnoff
* [Kitty Swan](/wiki/Kitty_Swan "Kitty Swan") as Flit's girlfriend
* [Ursula Janis](/w/index.php?title=Ursula_Janis&action=edit&redlink=1 "Ursula Janis (page does not exist)") as blonde Flit's girlfriend
* [Alfredo Marchetti](/w/index.php?title=Alfredo_Marchetti&action=edit&redlink=1 "Alfredo Marchetti (page does not exist)") as Flit's chief Hayes
